room_001.name: Classic Deluxe Room
room_001.description: Elegant and cosy, the Classic Deluxe features warm tones, a plush king bed, and a marble-clad en-suite bathroom with a soaking tub.

room_002.name: Superior Garden View
room_002.description: Wake up to verdant gardens from your private balcony. Spacious interiors blending contemporary design with Nigerian textile accents.

room_003.name: Junior Suite
room_003.description: A separate living area, dining nook, and a master bedroom with floor-to-ceiling windows make this suite a preferred choice for extended stays.

room_004.name: Presidential Suite
room_004.description: The pinnacle of luxury. Two bedrooms, a grand living room, a private chef's kitchen, and panoramic views across Abuja's skyline await you.
